evals.prompt: My 1987 Carrera 3.2 cranks with no injector pulse; fuel pump runs when jumpered
evals.expected_output: Asks for high-yield measurements and diagnoses speed/reference/DME power path

evals.prompt: Decode this 8KB 3.2 Motronic ROM and tell me if timing looks safe
evals.expected_output: Loads ROM/tuning references and flags uncertainty/safety
